hero_desc: SERIK connects you with thousands of rental houses around universities and neighborhoods.
hero_quote: "A youth's dreams begin in the ghetto, and we are with you to fulfill your dreams."
qa_desc: We know the challenges you face on the streets. Here's how we bring you peace of mind.
qa_q1: Are you tired of walking around in the sun looking for a rental house?
qa_a1: With SERIK, you can choose the room you want from thousands of houses right in your pocket.
qa_q2: Don't want to be scammed by untrustworthy brokers?
qa_a2: With SERIK, you speak directly to an approved landlord with no middleman hassle.
qa_q3: Afraid of living far from basic services or unsafe areas?
qa_a3: With SERIK, you see everything in advance—the distance from your campus and all nearby services.
qa_q4: Tired of seeing your rooms sit empty without tenants every college season?
qa_a4: With SERIK, you reach thousands of students at once and fill your house early without relying on brokers.
qa_footer: "A youth's dreams begin in the ghetto, and we are with you to fulfill your dreams."
how_subtitle: The simplicity of SERIK is in these three steps. See how you can find your new ghetto in minutes.
how_step1_desc: Enter your college name or your preferred street. SERIK will bring you all nearby ghettos and hostels in our system.
how_step2_desc: View real photos, compare rental prices, distance from campus, and check room features like water, electricity, and security.
how_step3_desc: Once you're satisfied with the room, take the number or get connected directly with an approved landlord to finalize the agreement.
how_video_caption: Watch how the app works to simplify your college life
features_desc: We've improved every step of the house search to give you a modern and reliable experience.
feature1_desc: Filter ghettos based on your budget, distance from campus, and features you want like veranda, fan, or indoor water.
feature2_desc: All photos are real and reviewed by our team before being placed on the app. No fake or online photos.
feature3_desc: The system opens quickly even on slow networks, with simple steps to get your room.
feature4_desc: Connect with real registered property owners. No bureaucracy, no brokers, no hidden fees.
testimonials_subtitle: What Are Students and Owners Saying?
testimonials_desc: Don't just take our word for it—read reviews from people who have put aside broker stress through SERIK.
testimonial1_text: Finding a ghetto while upcountry before reporting to college was a big test for me. But through SERIK, I got a room easily while still at home.
testimonial2_text: Brokers have been ripping me off with middleman fees every moving season. SERIK has reduced the hassle; I spoke directly to the owner and got a room—smooth sailing.
testimonial3_text: My hostel was taking too long to fill up with tenants at the start of the college season because of relying on local brokers. Since I started using SERIK, I reach many students quickly.
cta_title: Ready to Find Your Ghetto Stress-Free?
cta_desc: Stop wasting time in the sun and wasting money on brokers. Join SERIK now and enjoy college life.
footer_tagline: A digital marketplace connecting university students with verified property owners and hostels for safer and easier housing across Tanzania.
footer_quote: A youth's dreams begin in the ghetto.
modal_sajili_desc: To register your house or hostel on the SERIK system, please contact our support team directly:
modal_mwanafunzi_desc1: Clean Ghetto in Minutes? We're Coming to Clean Up the Street!
modal_mwanafunzi_desc2: We're finalizing the registration of the coolest ghettos and hostels in town to take away your broker stress.
modal_mwanafunzi_quote: Sit tight, the preparations for this college season will be a lot of fun!
